steps.title: Use the sales-tax column
steps.content: The question asks about states with a state-level sales tax, so use only that column. There are $39+6=45$ such states.

steps.title: Find the matching subgroup
steps.content: Among the states with a state-level sales tax, $6$ do not have a state-level income tax.

steps.title: Compute the percent
steps.content:
Divide the subgroup by the column total and convert to a percent.
$$\frac{6}{45}\cdot100\%=13.333\%$$
Rounded to the nearest tenth, this is $13.3\%$. The answer is C.
